title: FeeCondition-BasedModalityTypeValues
description: Fee is applied based on rules or criteria.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Threshold-Based
x-enumeration-literals.description: Applied only if certain limits are exceeded (e.g. >3 withdrawals/month).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Channel-Based
x-enumeration-literals.description: Different fees for online, branch, ATM, or mobile usage.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Location-Based
x-enumeration-literals.description: Domestic vs international (e.g. foreign ATM fees).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Profile-Based
x-enumeration-literals.description: Waived for premium customers or applied to basic accounts.
